content.text:
I can’t open that page directly, but I can help if you share the content. Please paste the text from the Gemini API “URL Context” page (or key sections), and I’ll:

- provide a concise summary
- highlight the key constraints (e.g., limits on URLs, content, privacy/data handling, and usage limits)

If you can’t paste the text, you can also upload a screenshot or list the main points you care about, and I’ll work from that.

If you’d rather I infer a general idea, I can give a high-level explanation of what a typical “URL Context” feature in an API like Gemini might include and what kinds of constraints are commonly documented.
